response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, clearly senior generalist with nearly two decades of software experience, strong TypeScript depth, and recent hands-on work with MCP tooling and agentic-workflow infrastructure. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year. The resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only light cloud-platform exposure (AWS CDK at one role). The gap on the core required qualification is too large for a staff-level GenAI forward-deployed position, despite genuine adjacent strengths.
strengths: Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant key technologies
Deep TypeScript/Node.js production experience across ~19 years, including staff-level roles and high-throughput low-latency systems
Strong customer-facing and mentoring track record: workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses he designed and delivered
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; substantive AI work only began in 2025
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python — all core to the role
Limited demonstrated cloud-platform depth for designing AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure beyond incidental CDK and Kubernetes use

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic-workflow exposure at current role
Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python evidence
